icp: Early-stage SaaS founders, indie hackers, small SaaS teams. Low resources, no lifecycle system in place, want fast results, technical or semi-technical.

categories.best_x: Best-of comparison queries. High commercial intent. ChatGPT typically cites listicles.
categories.how_to: Educational tactical queries. ChatGPT cites depth + structure (numbered steps, frameworks).
categories.concept: Definitional queries. ChatGPT cites authority sources with clear definitions.
categories.comparison: Direct head-to-head product comparisons. ChatGPT cites the highest-DA comparison page.
categories.examples: Examples/templates queries. ChatGPT cites visual-heavy library pages (our /library is a moat here).

priority_tiers.P0: Highest commercial intent + strongest DigiStorms differentiation (behavior-based, library moat). Tackle first.
priority_tiers.P1: Good ICP fit and writable angle. Tackle after P0 lands.
priority_tiers.P2: Long-tail or definitional. Cheap to write, useful for internal linking and topical authority.
